title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Verify that policy changes applied via Lens Cloud are reflected as locked/greyed-out settings on the device, and that user attempts to modify them are blocked with a dialog.
steps: Apply a policy to a device via Lens Cloud.
Change a policy setting in Lens Cloud.
Open the device settings page in the app.
Verify that the updated values from the policy are reflected on the device settings page.
Confirm that the affected settings are locked and greyed out.
Attempt to modify one of the policy-affected settings by clicking on it.
Observe that a dialog appears, blocking the modification.
expected: Policy-affected settings are updated, locked, and greyed out on the device settings page. Clicking on them shows a dialog and prevents modification.
